name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

VARIABLES forks, states
CONSTANT N \* number of philosophers and forks, N

\* Helper definitions
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

\* TypeOK invariant
TypeOK == 
    /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
    /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: forks[i] = 0 \/ forks[i] \in 1..N
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: states[i] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

\* Init state
Init == 
    /\ forks = [i \in 1..N -> 0]
    /\ states = [i \in 1..N -> "thinking"]

\* Next state
Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N:
        /\ states[i] = "thinking"
        /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
        /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 0
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
    \/ \E i \in 1..N:
        /\ states[i] = "eating"
        /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = i
        /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = 0, ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
    \/ \E i \in 1..N:
        /\ states[i] = "thinking"
        /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
        /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 0
        /\ forks' = forks
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES num, flag

(* num[i] is the ticket number of process i.
   flag[i] is TRUE if process i is choosing a number, FALSE otherwise. *)

(* TypeOK ensures that num and flag are functions from 1..N to Nat and Bool respectively. *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ num \in 1..N -> Nat
  /\ flag \in 1..N -> Bool

(* Init sets all tickets to 0 and all flags to FALSE. *)
Init == 
  /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Next defines the possible actions of each process i. *)
Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    (* Choosing phase: set flag[i] to TRUE. *)
    /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
    /\ num' = num
    /\ flag[i] = FALSE
    /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>> \* other variables unchanged

  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
    (* Assigning number: set flag[i] to FALSE and num[i] to 1 + max(num[j] | j \in 1..N). *)
    /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
    /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + MAX <<j \in 1..N : num[j]>>]
    /\ flag[i] = TRUE
    /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>> \* other variables unchanged

  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
    (* Entering critical section: process i waits until all other processes with lower numbers have exited. *)
    /\ flag' = flag
    /\ num' = num
    /\ flag[i] = FALSE
    /\ num[i] = 1 + MAX <<j \in 1..N : num[j]>> \* choosing phase
    /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>> \* other variables unchanged

  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
    (* Exiting critical section: set num[i] to 0. *)
    /\ flag' = flag
    /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>> \* other variables unchanged

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>> /\ TypeOK

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT K \* Queue capacity

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

\* q is a sequence of length K, representing the queue slots
\* head and tail are indices into q, ranging from 0 to K-1
\* size is the number of elements currently in the queue

TypeOK == 
  /\ K \in Nat
  /\ K > 0
  /\ q \in Seq(K)
  /\ head \in 0..K-1
  /\ tail \in 0..K-1
  /\ size \in 0..K

Init == 
  /\ q \in Seq(K)
  /\ head \in 0..K-1
  /\ tail \in 0..K-1
  /\ size \in 0..K
  /\ size = 0
  /\ head = 0
  /\ tail = 0
  /\ q = [i \in 0..K-1 |-> 0]

Producer == 
  /\ size < K
  /\ head' = (head + 1) % K
  /\ tail' = tail
  /\ size' = size + 1
  /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 1]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<head, tail, size, q>>

Consumer == 
  /\ size > 0
  /\ head' = head
  /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % K
  /\ size' = size - 1
  /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 0]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<head, tail, size, q>>

Next == 
  \/ Producer
  \/ Consumer

Spec == 
  /\ TypeOK
  /\ Init
  /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>
  /\ []<>(size < K) \* Producer blocks when full
  /\ []<>(size > 0) \* Consumer blocks when empty

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

(* --TYPE DEFINITIONS-- *)
StateType == {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}
TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"} \cup {None}
          /\ state \in StateType

(* --INITIALIZATION-- *)
Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = None
        /\ state = "Follower"

(* --STATE TRANSITIONS-- *)
FollowerToCandidate == /\ state = "Follower"
                      /\ state' = "Candidate"
                      /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
                      /\ votedFor' = state
                      /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

CandidateToLeader == /\ state = "Candidate"
                    /\ votedFor' = state
                    /\ state' = "Leader"
                    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

(* --NEXT STATE-- *)
Next == FollowerToCandidate
      \/ CandidateToLeader

(* --SPECIFICATION-- *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>> /\ TypeOK

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

TypeOK == /\ readers \in Nat
        /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

Init == /\ readers = 0
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

ReadAcquire == /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ readers' = readers + 1
              /\ writer_active' = writer_active

ReadRelease == /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ readers > 0
              /\ readers' = readers - 1
              /\ writer_active' = writer_active

WriteAcquire == /\ writer_active = FALSE
               /\ readers = 0
               /\ writer_active' = TRUE
               /\ readers' = readers

WriteRelease == /\ writer_active = TRUE
               /\ writer_active' = FALSE
               /\ readers' = readers

Next == \/ ReadAcquire
      \/ ReadRelease
      \/ WriteAcquire
      \/ WriteRelease

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>> /\ TypeOK

EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

VARIABLE token

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC, Sequences

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLE store

(* TypeOK ensures store is a partial function from Keys to Values *)
TypeOK == store \in [Keys -> Values]

(* Init: store is empty *)
Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

(* Put operation: updates store with new value for key k *)
Put(k, v) == /\ k \in Keys
            /\ v \in Values
            /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

(* Get operation: returns current value for key k *)
Get(k, v) == /\ k \in Keys
             /\ v \in Values
             /\ v = store[k]
             /\ store' = store

(* Next: either a Put or a Get *)
Next == \/ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : Put(k, v)
     \/ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : Get(k, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SingleDecreePaxos ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, M, V, None

VARIABLES ballot, promised, promisedVal, accepted, acceptedVal, chosenVal
BallotNum == [p \in 1..M |-> ballot[p]]
PromisedNum == [a \in 1..N |-> promised[a]]
AcceptedNum == [a \in 1..N |-> accepted[a]]
PromisedVal == [a \in 1..N |-> promisedVal[a]]
AcceptedVal == [a \in 1..N |-> acceptedVal[a]]

\* Type invariant
TypeOK == /\ ballot \in [1..M -> Nat]
        /\ promised \in [1..N -> Nat]
        /\ promisedVal \in [1..N -> V \cup {None}]
        /\ accepted \in [1..N -> Nat]
        /\ acceptedVal \in [1..N -> V \cup {None}]
        /\ chosenVal \in V \cup {None}

\* Initial state
Init == /\ ballot = [p \in 1..M |-> 0]
        /\ promised = [a \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ promisedVal = [a \in 1..N |-> None]
        /\ accepted = [a \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ acceptedVal = [a \in 1..N |-> None]
        /\ chosenVal = None

\* Prepare/Promise phase
Prepare(p, a) == /\ ballot[p] = a
                 /\ promised[a] <= a
                 /\ promised[a] = a
                 /\ promisedVal[a] = IF accepted[a] > 0 THEN acceptedVal[a] ELSE None

\* Accept/Accepted phase
Accept(p, a, v) == /\ ballot[p] = a
                  /\ promised[a] = a
                  /\ accepted[a] = a
                  /\ acceptedVal[a] = v

\* Choose phase
Choose(v) == /\ chosenVal = None
            /\ chosenVal' = v

\* Next-state relation
Next == \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E a \in 1..N :
          /\ ballot[p] = a
          /\ Prepare(p, a)
        \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E a \in 1..N : \E v \in V :
          /\ ballot[p] = a
          /\ promised[a] = a
          /\ Accept(p, a, v)
        \/ /\ chosenVal = None
           /\ \E v \in V:
              /\ \A a \in 1..N: accepted[a] = a
              /\ \A a \in 1..N: acceptedVal[a] = v
              /\ Choose(v)

\* Specification
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<ballot, promised, promisedVal, accepted, acceptedVal, chosenVal>> /\ TypeOK
